title: Navigating post-16 careers guidance: supporting learners from lower socioeconomic backgrounds
body: "This review focuses on the careers guidance that students from lower socioeconomic backgrounds receive from further education providers.  Research visits for this review were carried out in the 2024 summer term and included visits to:   3 secondary schools 19 general further education colleges 6 sixth-form colleges   We also carried out interviews with 7 local authorities, 2 focus groups with employers, and a survey of parents from the schools and colleges we visited.  The purpose of this review is set out in the terms of reference.   This report is the third in a series of studies commissioned by the Department for Education (DfE) looking at careers guidance. Read the other 2 reviews:   Independent review of careers guidance in schools and further education and skills providers Independent review of careers guidance in specialist settings    "
